original_abstract: The self-assembly of concave bis-monodentate ligands with square-planar metal cations into discrete [M<sub>n</sub>L<sub>2n</sub>] cage structures is reviewed. Simple topologies, knots and interpenetrated dimers are treated.
humanized_abstract: This review focuses on the self-assembly of concave bis-monodentate ligands with square-planar metal cations into discrete [M<sub>n</sub>L<sub>2n</sub>] cage structures. It focuses primarily on simple topologies, including knots and interpenetrated dimers.

document.output: This review focuses on the self-assembly of concave bis-monodentate ligands with square-planar metal cations into discrete [M<sub>n</sub>L<sub>2n</sub>] cage structures. It focuses primarily on simple topologies, including knots and interpenetrated dimers.
document.input: The self-assembly of concave bis-monodentate ligands with square-planar metal cations into discrete [M<sub>n</sub>L<sub>2n</sub>] cage structures is reviewed. Simple topologies, knots and interpenetrated dimers are treated.
